data.name: Futa on Top
data.detailed_description:
A kink-driven visual novel featuring dominant futa characters and submissive male partners. Designed for players who crave assertive, commanding futa dommes and richly detailed erotic scenarios.

---

Features:

  • 4 lengthy futa-dom scenes (800+ 4K images) 🫦

  • Explicit dialogue & kink-focused writing ✍️

  • Bold, dominant futa characters 💪

  • Immersive adult SFX + moaning 🔊


---
Kinks Explored:

  • Futa Threesome 👯‍♀️ | Feminization 💄

  • Anal 🍑 | Oral Obedience / Deep Servitude 👅

  • Cuckold / Cuckqueaning Themes 🔒

  • Ball Teasing & Worship 🥜

  • Size Difference & Size Play 📏

data.short_description: 💕Futa on Top is a dystopian futa-dom visual novel ✨a galaxy ruled by futa queens 👑 where broken, desperate males worship futa code on their knees, begging to have every strand of their DNA claimed, corrupted, and rewritten 🧬

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2 and/or DirectX 9
